Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Incarnation]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — If the chains cover a person's body, it leads to Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Simon wishes to avoid risking Incarnation.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Incarnations can warp the world around them to reform reality into their Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Incarnations are kept enslaved by a system that pays lives to maintain it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Incarnation is the process where a Traveler loses control of their power due to being covered by black chain-marks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — The Incarnation has attacked the Damascans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Incarnations become trapped if they enter their own Territories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — The Incarnation is located within the corridors of the house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — The Incarnation is the incarnation of the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — An Incarnation is a force, like heat or gravity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — An Incarnation is an embodiment of their Territory's nature and power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Incarnations can summon an army of monsters from their Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — The Incarnation found two survivors of the Dragon Army slaughter worthy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Simon needs the mask to defeat the Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — The Incarnation is a part of Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — If the chains wrap fully around Simon's neck, he will reach Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — The Incarnation is a combatant in the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — The Incarnation was battling Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Alin was unsure of his ability to help against the full power of an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The Incarnation possesses a flame-headed hammer.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Zakareth could see the benefits of Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Alin is an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Simon's mission is to fight an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Incarnations are exceptions to many rules.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — Incarnations do not return when they are killed; instead, they leave the way free for another to Incarnate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — An Incarnation's eyes are characterized by darkness bleeding into the whites.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — An Incarnation has dark chains on their skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Incarnations can be sealed or killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — The Incarnation is wrecking the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — The Incarnation is a creature with clockwork components beneath its armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Simon considers calling steel to turn into an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Incarnation happens to Travelers who draw too much of their Territory's power into themselves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Indirial was seen fighting what may or may not have been an Incarnation before he vanished.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Being transformed into an Incarnation is considered a death sentence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Ornheim Incarnation summoned golems to fight Kathrin and Andra.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
